While video object editing offers a promising path for data augmentation, existing methods often struggle to maintain both high visual fidelity and temporal coherence. In this work, we propose \textbf{Mirage}, a one-step video diffusion model for photorealistic and coherent asset editing in driving scenes. Mirage builds upon a text-to-video diffusion prior to ensure temporal consistency across frames. However, 3D causal variational autoencoders often suffer from degraded spatial fidelity due to compression, and directly passing 3D encoder features to decoder layers breaks temporal causality. To address this, we inject temporally agnostic latents from a pretrained 2D encoder into the 3D decoder to restore detail while preserving causal structures. Furthermore, because scene objects and inserted assets are optimized under different objectives, their Gaussians exhibit a distribution mismatch that leads to pose misalignment. To mitigate this, we introduce a two-stage data alignment strategy combining coarse 3D alignment and fine 2D refinement, thereby improving alignment and providing cleaner supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Mirage achieves high realism and temporal consistency across diverse editing scenarios. Beyond asset editing, Mirage can also generalize to other video-to-video translation tasks, serving as a reliable baseline for future research. Our code is available at https://github.com/wm-research/mirage.
tldr: Mirage is a one-step video diffusion model for photorealistic and temporally coherent asset editing in driving scenes, addressing limitations in existing methods regarding visual fidelity and temporal consistency by injecting temporally agnostic latents and using a two-stage data alignment strategy.
tldr_zh: Mirage是一个用于驾驶场景中照片级真实且时间上连贯的资产编辑的单步视频扩散模型。它通过注入时间无关的潜在变量和使用两阶段数据对齐策略，解决了现有方法在视觉保真度和时间一致性方面的局限性。
summary_zh: 以视觉为中心的自动驾驶系统依赖于多样且可扩展的训练数据来实现稳健的性能。虽然视频对象编辑为数据增强提供了一条有希望的途径，但现有方法通常难以同时保持高视觉保真度和时间连贯性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 \textbf{Mirage}，一种用于驾驶场景中照片级真实且连贯的资产编辑的单步视频扩散模型。Mirage 基于文本到视频的扩散先验，以确保跨帧的时间一致性。然而，3D因果变分自编码器通常会因压缩而遭受空间保真度降低，并且直接将 3D 编码器特征传递到解码器层会破坏时间因果关系。为了解决这个问题，我们将来自预训练的 2D 编码器的、时间无关的潜在变量注入到 3D 解码器中，以在保留因果结构的同时恢复细节。此外，由于场景对象和插入的资产是在不同的目标下进行优化的，因此它们的高斯分布表现出分布不匹配，从而导致姿态错位。为了缓解这种情况，我们引入了一种两阶段数据对齐策略，结合了粗略的 3D 对齐和精细的 2D 细化，从而提高了对齐效果并提供了更清晰的监督。大量实验表明，Mirage 在各种编辑场景中实现了高真实感和时间一致性。除了资产编辑之外，Mirage 还可以推广到其他视频到视频的翻译任务，作为未来研究的可靠基线。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wm-research/mirage 获取。

title: Taming Preference Mode Collapse via Directional Decoupling Alignment in Diffusion Reinforcement Learning
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated significant progress in aligning text-to-image diffusion models with human preference via Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback. However, while existing methods achieve high scores on automated reward metrics, they often lead to Preference Mode Collapse (PMC)-a specific form of reward hacking where models converge on narrow, high-scoring outputs (e.g., images with monolithic styles or pervasive overexposure), severely degrading generative diversity. In this work, we introduce and quantify this phenomenon, proposing DivGenBench, a novel benchmark designed to measure the extent of PMC. We posit that this collapse is driven by over-optimization along the reward model's inherent biases. Building on this analysis, we propose Directional Decoupling Alignment (D$^2$-Align), a novel framework that mitigates PMC by directionally correcting the reward signal. Specifically, our method first learns a directional correction within the reward model's embedding space while keeping the model frozen. This correction is then applied to the reward signal during the optimization process, preventing the model from collapsing into specific modes and thereby maintaining diversity. Our comprehensive evaluation, combining qualitative analysis with quantitative metrics for both quality and diversity, reveals that D$^2$-Align achieves superior alignment with human preference.
tldr: This paper introduces a method called Directional Decoupling Alignment (D$^2$-Align) to address preference mode collapse in diffusion reinforcement learning, enhancing generative diversity by correcting reward signal biases.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为方向解耦对齐（D$^2$-Align）的方法，旨在解决扩散强化学习中的偏好模式崩溃问题，通过纠正奖励信号偏差来增强生成多样性。
summary_zh: 近期研究表明，通过基于人类反馈的强化学习，在对齐文本到图像扩散模型与人类偏好方面取得了显著进展。然而，虽然现有方法在自动化奖励指标上取得了高分，但它们经常导致偏好模式坍塌 (PMC) —— 一种特殊的奖励欺骗形式，其中模型收敛于狭窄的、高分的输出（例如，具有单一风格或普遍过度曝光的图像），严重降低了生成多样性。在这项工作中，我们介绍并量化了这一现象，并提出了 DivGenBench，这是一个旨在衡量 PMC 程度的新基准。我们推测这种坍塌是由沿奖励模型固有偏差过度优化驱动的。基于这一分析，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即定向解耦对齐 (D$^2$-Align)，通过定向校正奖励信号来减轻 PMC。具体来说，我们的方法首先在保持模型冻结的情况下，在奖励模型的嵌入空间内学习定向校正。然后在优化过程中将此校正应用于奖励信号，从而防止模型坍塌到特定模式，并保持多样性。我们的综合评估，结合了定性分析以及质量和多样性的定量指标，表明 D$^2$-Align 实现了与人类偏好的卓越对齐。

title: DriveExplorer: Images-Only Decoupled 4D Reconstruction with Progressive Restoration for Driving View Extrapolation
summary: This paper presents an effective solution for view extrapolation in autonomous driving scenarios. Recent approaches focus on generating shifted novel view images from given viewpoints using diffusion models. However, these methods heavily rely on priors such as LiDAR point clouds, 3D bounding boxes, and lane annotations, which demand expensive sensors or labor-intensive labeling, limiting applicability in real-world deployment. In this work, with only images and optional camera poses, we first estimate a global static point cloud and per-frame dynamic point clouds, fusing them into a unified representation. We then employ a deformable 4D Gaussian framework to reconstruct the scene. The initially trained 4D Gaussian model renders degraded and pseudo-images to train a video diffusion model. Subsequently, progressively shifted Gaussian renderings are iteratively refined by the diffusion model,and the enhanced results are incorporated back as training data for 4DGS. This process continues until extrapolation reaches the target viewpoints. Compared with baselines, our method produces higher-quality images at novel extrapolated viewpoints.
tldr: The paper introduces DriveExplorer, an image-only method for view extrapolation in autonomous driving using deformable 4D Gaussians and video diffusion models, removing the need for expensive LiDAR or manual labeling.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DriveExplorer，一种仅使用图像的自动驾驶视角外推方法，它利用可变形的4D高斯分布和视频扩散模型，无需昂贵的激光雷达或手动标注。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶场景中视点外推的有效解决方案。最近的方法侧重于利用扩散模型从给定视点生成偏移的新视角图像。然而，这些方法严重依赖于诸如激光雷达点云、3D bounding boxes 和车道线标注等先验信息，这些信息需要昂贵的传感器或劳动密集型的标注，从而限制了在真实世界部署中的适用性。在这项工作中，我们仅使用图像和可选的相机姿态，首先估计一个全局静态点云和逐帧的动态点云，并将它们融合到一个统一的表示中。然后，我们采用可变形的 4D 高斯框架来重建场景。初始训练的 4D 高斯模型渲染出降质的和伪造的图像，用于训练视频扩散模型。随后，逐渐偏移的高斯渲染结果会通过扩散模型进行迭代细化，并将增强后的结果反馈作为 4DGS 的训练数据。这个过程持续进行，直到外推达到目标视点。与基线方法相比，我们的方法在新的外推视点上产生更高质量的图像。

title: Diffusion Knows Transparency: Repurposing Video Diffusion for Transparent Object Depth and Normal Estimation
summary: Transparent objects remain notoriously hard for perception systems: refraction, reflection and transmission break the assumptions behind stereo, ToF and purely discriminative monocular depth, causing holes and temporally unstable estimates. Our key observation is that modern video diffusion models already synthesize convincing transparent phenomena, suggesting they have internalized the optical rules. We build TransPhy3D, a synthetic video corpus of transparent/reflective scenes: 11k sequences rendered with Blender/Cycles. Scenes are assembled from a curated bank of category-rich static assets and shape-rich procedural assets paired with glass/plastic/metal materials. We render RGB + depth + normals with physically based ray tracing and OptiX denoising. Starting from a large video diffusion model, we learn a video-to-video translator for depth (and normals) via lightweight LoRA adapters. During training we concatenate RGB and (noisy) depth latents in the DiT backbone and co-train on TransPhy3D and existing frame-wise synthetic datasets, yielding temporally consistent predictions for arbitrary-length input videos. The resulting model, DKT, achieves zero-shot SOTA on real and synthetic video benchmarks involving transparency: ClearPose, DREDS (CatKnown/CatNovel), and TransPhy3D-Test. It improves accuracy and temporal consistency over strong image/video baselines, and a normal variant sets the best video normal estimation results on ClearPose. A compact 1.3B version runs at ~0.17 s/frame. Integrated into a grasping stack, DKT's depth boosts success rates across translucent, reflective and diffuse surfaces, outperforming prior estimators. Together, these results support a broader claim: "Diffusion knows transparency." Generative video priors can be repurposed, efficiently and label-free, into robust, temporally coherent perception for challenging real-world manipulation.
tldr: This paper introduces DKT, a video diffusion model repurposed for transparent object depth and normal estimation, achieving SOTA results on real and synthetic video benchmarks and improving grasping success rates.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了DKT，一种重新用于透明物体深度和法线估计的视频扩散模型，在真实和合成视频基准测试中取得了SOTA结果，并提高了抓取成功率。
summary_zh: 透明物体仍然是感知系统面临的巨大难题：折射、反射和透射现象打破了双目视觉、飞行时间（ToF）以及纯粹判别式单目深度估计背后的假设，导致出现空洞和时间上不稳定的估计值。我们的关键观察是，现代视频扩散模型已经能合成出令人信服的透明现象，表明它们已经内化了光学规则。我们构建了TransPhy3D，一个透明/反射场景的合成视频语料库：使用Blender/Cycles渲染的1.1万个序列。场景由精心设计的、类别丰富的静态资产库和形状丰富的程序化资产库组合而成，并配有玻璃/塑料/金属材质。我们使用基于物理的射线追踪和OptiX去噪渲染RGB + 深度 + 法线数据。从一个大型视频扩散模型出发，我们通过轻量级的LoRA适配器学习一个用于深度（和法线）的视频到视频转换器。在训练过程中，我们将RGB和（带噪声的）深度潜在变量在DiT骨干网络中进行拼接，并在TransPhy3D和现有的逐帧合成数据集上进行联合训练，从而为任意长度的输入视频生成时间上一致的预测结果。由此产生的模型DKT在涉及透明度的真实和合成视频基准测试上实现了零样本SOTA性能：ClearPose、DREDS（CatKnown/CatNovel）和TransPhy3D-Test。它提高了在强图像/视频基线上的准确性和时间一致性，并且一个法线变体在ClearPose上取得了最佳的视频法线估计结果。一个紧凑的13亿参数版本以约0.17秒/帧的速度运行。集成到抓取流程中，DKT的深度估计提高了跨半透明、反射和漫反射表面的成功率，优于之前的估计器。总之，这些结果支持一个更广泛的主张：“扩散模型懂得透明度”。生成式视频先验可以被有效地、无需标签地重新用于具有挑战性的真实世界操作中鲁棒、时间一致的感知。

title: Policy Mirror Descent with Temporal Difference Learning: Sample Complexity under Online Markov Data
summary: This paper studies the policy mirror descent (PMD) method, which is a general policy optimization framework in reinforcement learning and can cover a wide range of policy gradient methods by specifying difference mirror maps. Existing sample complexity analysis for policy mirror descent either focuses on the generative sampling model, or the Markovian sampling model but with the action values being explicitly approximated to certain pre-specified accuracy. In contrast, we consider the sample complexity of policy mirror descent with temporal difference (TD) learning under the Markovian sampling model. Two algorithms called Expected TD-PMD and Approximate TD-PMD have been presented, which are off-policy and mixed policy algorithms respectively. Under a small enough constant policy update step size, the $\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-2})$ (a logarithm factor about $\varepsilon$ is hidden in $\tilde{O}(\cdot)$) sample complexity can be established for them to achieve average-time $\varepsilon$-optimality. The sample complexity is further improved to $O(\varepsilon^{-2})$ (without the hidden logarithm factor) to achieve the last-iterate $\varepsilon$-optimality based on adaptive policy update step sizes.
tldr: The paper analyzes the sample complexity of Policy Mirror Descent combined with Temporal Difference learning under a Markovian sampling model, presenting two algorithms with improved sample complexity bounds.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了马尔可夫采样模型下策略镜像下降与时间差分学习相结合的样本复杂度，提出了两种具有改进样本复杂度界限的算法。
summary_zh: 本文研究策略镜像下降（PMD）方法，这是一种强化学习中通用的策略优化框架，通过指定不同的镜像映射可以覆盖广泛的策略梯度方法。现有策略镜像下降的样本复杂度分析要么关注生成式采样模型，要么关注马尔可夫采样模型，但需要在马尔可夫采样模型下显式地近似行动价值至特定的预设精度。与此相反，我们考虑了在马尔可夫采样模型下，采用时序差分（TD）学习的策略镜像下降的样本复杂度。提出了两种算法，分别称为期望TD-PMD和近似TD-PMD，它们分别是离策略和混合策略算法。在足够小的常数策略更新步长下，可以证明它们达到平均时间$\varepsilon$-最优性的样本复杂度为$\tilde{O}(\varepsilon^{-2})$（$\tilde{O}(\cdot)$中隐藏了一个关于$\varepsilon$的对数因子）。基于自适应策略更新步长，达到最后一次迭代$\varepsilon$-最优性的样本复杂度进一步提高至$O(\varepsilon^{-2})$（不包含隐藏的对数因子）。

title: Assured Autonomy: How Operations Research Powers and Orchestrates Generative AI Systems
summary: Generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) is shifting from conversational assistants toward agentic systems -- autonomous decision-making systems that sense, decide, and act within operational workflows. This shift creates an autonomy paradox: as GenAI systems are granted greater operational autonomy, they should, by design, embody more formal structure, more explicit constraints, and stronger tail-risk discipline. We argue stochastic generative models can be fragile in operational domains unless paired with mechanisms that provide verifiable feasibility, robustness to distribution shift, and stress testing under high-consequence scenarios. To address this challenge, we develop a conceptual framework for assured autonomy grounded in operations research (OR), built on two complementary approaches. First, flow-based generative models frame generation as deterministic transport characterized by an ordinary differential equation, enabling auditability, constraint-aware generation, and connections to optimal transport, robust optimization, and sequential decision control. Second, operational safety is formulated through an adversarial robustness lens: decision rules are evaluated against worst-case perturbations within uncertainty or ambiguity sets, making unmodeled risks part of the design. This framework clarifies how increasing autonomy shifts OR's role from solver to guardrail to system architect, with responsibility for control logic, incentive protocols, monitoring regimes, and safety boundaries. These elements define a research agenda for assured autonomy in safety-critical, reliability-sensitive operational domains.
tldr: This paper proposes a framework for assured autonomy in GenAI systems by integrating operations research (OR) methods like flow-based generative models and adversarial robustness to address safety and reliability concerns, especially in safety-critical domains.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个用于确保GenAI系统自主性的框架，通过整合运筹学（OR）方法，如基于流的生成模型和对抗鲁棒性，来解决安全和可靠性问题，尤其是在安全关键领域。
summary_zh: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）正从对话式助手转向具身智能体系统——能够在运营工作流程中感知、决策和行动的自主决策系统。这一转变带来了一个自主悖论：随着GenAI系统被赋予更大的运营自主性，它们理应在设计上体现出更正式的结构、更明确的约束以及更强的尾部风险控制。我们认为，随机生成模型在运营领域可能很脆弱，除非与可验证的可行性、对分布偏移的稳健性以及在高后果场景下的压力测试机制相结合。为了应对这一挑战，我们开发了一个基于运筹学（OR）的保证自主的概念框架，该框架建立在两种互补方法之上。首先，基于流的生成模型将生成过程视为由常微分方程表征的确定性传输过程，从而实现可审计性、约束感知生成以及与最优传输、鲁棒优化和序贯决策控制的连接。其次，运营安全通过对抗鲁棒性的视角进行形式化：决策规则针对不确定性或模糊集内的最坏情况扰动进行评估，从而将未建模的风险纳入设计中。这个框架阐明了增加自主性如何将运筹学的角色从求解器转变为护栏再到系统架构师，承担控制逻辑、激励协议、监控机制和安全边界的职责。这些要素定义了一个在安全攸关、可靠性敏感的运营领域中保证自主的研究议程。

title: Stationary Reweighting Yields Local Convergence of Soft Fitted Q-Iteration
summary: Fitted Q-iteration (FQI) and its entropy-regularized variant, soft FQI, are central tools for value-based model-free offline reinforcement learning, but can behave poorly under function approximation and distribution shift. In the entropy-regularized setting, we show that the soft Bellman operator is locally contractive in the stationary norm of the soft-optimal policy, rather than in the behavior norm used by standard FQI. This geometric mismatch explains the instability of soft Q-iteration with function approximation in the absence of Bellman completeness. To restore contraction, we introduce stationary-reweighted soft FQI, which reweights each regression update using the stationary distribution of the current policy. We prove local linear convergence under function approximation with geometrically damped weight-estimation errors, assuming approximate realizability. Our analysis further suggests that global convergence may be recovered by gradually reducing the softmax temperature, and that this continuation approach can extend to the hardmax limit under a mild margin condition.
tldr: This paper introduces a stationary-reweighted soft Fitted Q-Iteration method to address instability issues in soft Q-iteration with function approximation, proving local linear convergence and suggesting potential global convergence strategies.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种 stationary-reweighted soft Fitted Q-Iteration 方法，旨在解决函数逼近中 soft Q-iteration 的不稳定问题，证明了局部线性收敛性，并提出了潜在的全局收敛策略。
summary_zh: 拟合Q迭代 (FQI) 及其熵正则化变体，软FQI，是基于值且无模型的离线强化学习的核心工具，但在函数逼近和分布偏移下表现不佳。在熵正则化设置中，我们证明了软贝尔曼算子在软最优策略的平稳范数下是局部收缩的，而不是在标准FQI使用的行为范数下。这种几何不匹配解释了在缺乏贝尔曼完备性的情况下，软Q迭代与函数逼近的不稳定性。 为了恢复收缩性，我们引入了平稳重加权软FQI，它使用当前策略的平稳分布对每个回归更新进行重加权。我们证明了在函数逼近下的局部线性收敛，假设近似可实现性，且误差呈几何阻尼。 我们的分析进一步表明，可以通过逐渐降低softmax温度来恢复全局收敛，并且在温和的裕度条件下，这种连续性方法可以扩展到hardmax极限。

title: Constraint Breeds Generalization: Temporal Dynamics as an Inductive Bias
summary: Conventional deep learning prioritizes unconstrained optimization, yet biological systems operate under strict metabolic constraints. We propose that these physical constraints shape dynamics to function not as limitations, but as a temporal inductive bias that breeds generalization. Through a phase-space analysis of signal propagation, we reveal a fundamental asymmetry: expansive dynamics amplify noise, whereas proper dissipative dynamics compress phase space that aligns with the network's spectral bias, compelling the abstraction of invariant features. This condition can be imposed externally via input encoding, or intrinsically through the network's own temporal dynamics. Both pathways require architectures capable of temporal integration and proper constraints to decode induced invariants, whereas static architectures fail to capitalize on temporal structure. Through comprehensive evaluations across supervised classification, unsupervised reconstruction, and zero-shot reinforcement learning, we demonstrate that a critical "transition" regime maximizes generalization capability. These findings establish dynamical constraints as a distinct class of inductive bias, suggesting that robust AI development requires not only scaling and removing limitations, but computationally mastering the temporal characteristics that naturally promote generalization.
tldr: The paper proposes that temporal dynamics and constraints, inspired by biological systems, act as an inductive bias that promotes generalization in deep learning, particularly through controlling phase space dynamics. They show, through experiments, that temporal architectures under constraint outperform static ones.
tldr_zh: 本文提出，受生物系统启发的时序动态和约束可以作为一种归纳偏置，促进深度学习中的泛化，特别是通过控制相空间动力学。他们通过实验表明，受约束的时序架构优于静态架构。
summary_zh: 传统深度学习优先考虑无约束优化，然而生物系统却在严格的代谢约束下运作。我们提出，这些物理约束塑造了动力学，使其功能不是作为限制，而是作为一个培育泛化能力的时间归纳偏置。通过信号传播的相空间分析，我们揭示了一个根本的不对称性：膨胀动力学会放大噪声，而适当的耗散动力学则压缩相空间，使其与网络的谱偏置对齐，从而迫使不变特征的抽象。这种条件可以通过输入编码从外部施加，也可以通过网络自身的时间动态从内部施加。这两种途径都需要能够进行时间积分和适当约束的架构来解码诱导的不变量，而静态架构无法利用时间结构。通过在监督分类、无监督重构和零样本强化学习中的全面评估，我们证明了一个关键的“过渡”状态最大化了泛化能力。这些发现将动态约束确立为一类独特的归纳偏置，表明鲁棒人工智能的开发不仅需要扩展和消除限制，还需要在计算上掌握自然地促进泛化的时间特性。

title: Max-Entropy Reinforcement Learning with Flow Matching and A Case Study on LQR
summary: Soft actor-critic (SAC) is a popular algorithm for max-entropy reinforcement learning. In practice, the energy-based policies in SAC are often approximated using simple policy classes for efficiency, sacrificing the expressiveness and robustness. In this paper, we propose a variant of the SAC algorithm that parameterizes the policy with flow-based models, leveraging their rich expressiveness. In the algorithm, we evaluate the flow-based policy utilizing the instantaneous change-of-variable technique and update the policy with an online variant of flow matching developed in this paper. This online variant, termed importance sampling flow matching (ISFM), enables policy update with only samples from a user-specified sampling distribution rather than the unknown target distribution. We develop a theoretical analysis of ISFM, characterizing how different choices of sampling distributions affect the learning efficiency. Finally, we conduct a case study of our algorithm on the max-entropy linear quadratic regulator problems, demonstrating that the proposed algorithm learns the optimal action distribution.
tldr: This paper proposes a Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) variant utilizing flow-based models for policy parameterization and introduces importance sampling flow matching (ISFM) for policy updates. The approach is validated on max-entropy LQR problems.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种软 actor-critic (SAC) 算法的变体，该变体利用基于流的模型进行策略参数化，并引入了重要性采样流匹配 (ISFM) 用于策略更新。该方法在最大熵 LQR 问题上得到了验证。
summary_zh: 软演员-评论家 (SAC) 是一种流行的用于最大熵强化学习的算法。在实践中，SAC 中基于能量的策略通常使用简单的策略类进行近似，以提高效率，但这牺牲了表达性和鲁棒性。在本文中，我们提出了一种 SAC 算法的变体，该算法使用基于流的模型来参数化策略，从而利用了它们丰富的表达性。在该算法中，我们利用瞬时变量变换技术评估基于流的策略，并使用本文中开发的在线流匹配变体来更新策略。这种在线变体被称为重要性采样流匹配 (ISFM)，它使得仅使用来自用户指定的采样分布的样本，而不是未知的目标分布的样本来更新策略成为可能。我们对 ISFM 进行了理论分析，描述了不同的采样分布选择如何影响学习效率。最后，我们在最大熵线性二次调节器问题上对我们的算法进行了案例研究，证明了所提出的算法能够学习到最优的行动分布。

title: Fitted Q Evaluation Without Bellman Completeness via Stationary Weighting
summary: Fitted Q-evaluation (FQE) is a central method for off-policy evaluation in reinforcement learning, but it generally requires Bellman completeness: that the hypothesis class is closed under the evaluation Bellman operator. This requirement is challenging because enlarging the hypothesis class can worsen completeness. We show that the need for this assumption stems from a fundamental norm mismatch: the Bellman operator is gamma-contractive under the stationary distribution of the target policy, whereas FQE minimizes Bellman error under the behavior distribution. We propose a simple fix: reweight each regression step using an estimate of the stationary density ratio, thereby aligning FQE with the norm in which the Bellman operator contracts. This enables strong evaluation guarantees in the absence of realizability or Bellman completeness, avoiding the geometric error blow-up of standard FQE in this setting while maintaining the practicality of regression-based evaluation.
tldr: This paper proposes a reweighting scheme for Fitted Q-Evaluation (FQE) to address the Bellman completeness requirement, enabling robust off-policy evaluation without strong assumptions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种Fitted Q-Evaluation (FQE)的重加权方案，用于解决Bellman完备性要求，从而在没有强假设的情况下实现稳健的离线策略评估。
summary_zh: 拟合Q评估(FQE)是强化学习中一种核心的策略外评估方法，但它通常需要贝尔曼完备性：即假设类在评估贝尔曼算子下是封闭的。这个要求颇具挑战性，因为扩大假设类可能会恶化完备性。我们证明了对这个假设的需求源于一个根本性的范数不匹配：贝尔曼算子在目标策略的平稳分布下是gamma-压缩的，而FQE最小化的是在行为分布下的贝尔曼误差。我们提出了一个简单的修正方案：使用平稳密度比率的估计来重新加权每个回归步骤，从而使FQE与贝尔曼算子收缩的范数对齐。这使得在缺乏可实现性或贝尔曼完备性的情况下也能获得强大的评估保证，避免了标准FQE在这种情况下几何误差爆炸的问题，同时保持了基于回归评估的实用性。

title: Bellman Calibration for V-Learning in Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: We introduce Iterated Bellman Calibration, a simple, model-agnostic, post-hoc procedure for calibrating off-policy value predictions in infinite-horizon Markov decision processes. Bellman calibration requires that states with similar predicted long-term returns exhibit one-step returns consistent with the Bellman equation under the target policy. We adapt classical histogram and isotonic calibration to the dynamic, counterfactual setting by repeatedly regressing fitted Bellman targets onto a model's predictions, using a doubly robust pseudo-outcome to handle off-policy data. This yields a one-dimensional fitted value iteration scheme that can be applied to any value estimator. Our analysis provides finite-sample guarantees for both calibration and prediction under weak assumptions, and critically, without requiring Bellman completeness or realizability.
tldr: The paper introduces Iterated Bellman Calibration, a model-agnostic method for calibrating off-policy value predictions in RL using a fitted value iteration scheme while providing finite-sample guarantees without strong assumptions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种迭代贝尔曼校准方法，这是一种模型无关的方法，用于在强化学习中校准 off-policy 价值预测，该方法使用拟合价值迭代方案，并在没有强假设的情况下提供有限样本保证。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种称为迭代贝尔曼校准的简单、模型无关的后验方法，用以校准无限视界马尔可夫决策过程中策略外价值预测。贝尔曼校准要求具有相似预测长期回报的状态，其单步回报与目标策略下的贝尔曼方程保持一致。通过使用双重鲁棒的伪结果处理策略外数据，我们将经典的直方图校准和保序校准调整到动态的、反事实的环境中，通过重复地将拟合的贝尔曼目标回归到模型的预测上。这产生了一个一维的拟合价值迭代方案，可以应用于任何价值估计器。我们的分析在弱假设下为校准和预测提供了有限样本保证，并且关键的是，不需要贝尔曼完备性或可实现性。

title: Geometric Multi-Session Map Merging with Learned Local Descriptors
summary: Multi-session map merging is crucial for extended autonomous operations in large-scale environments. In this paper, we present GMLD, a learning-based local descriptor framework for large-scale multi-session point cloud map merging that systematically aligns maps collected across different sessions with overlapping regions. The proposed framework employs a keypoint-aware encoder and a plane-based geometric transformer to extract discriminative features for loop closure detection and relative pose estimation. To further improve global consistency, we include inter-session scan matching cost factors in the factor-graph optimization stage. We evaluate our framework on the public datasets, as well as self-collected data from diverse environments. The results show accurate and robust map merging with low error, and the learned features deliver strong performance in both loop closure detection and relative pose estimation.
tldr: This paper introduces GMLD, a learning-based local descriptor framework for multi-session point cloud map merging, demonstrating improved accuracy and robustness in loop closure detection and relative pose estimation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了GMLD，一种基于学习的局部描述符框架，用于多会话点云地图合并， 并在回环检测和相对姿态估计中表现出更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 多会话地图融合对于在大型环境中进行扩展自主操作至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的局部描述子框架GMLD，用于大规模多会话点云地图融合，该框架系统性地对齐不同会话中采集的、具有重叠区域的地图。提出的框架采用关键点感知编码器和基于平面的几何变换器，以提取用于回环检测和相对位姿估计的判别性特征。为了进一步提高全局一致性，我们在因子图优化阶段中加入了会话间的扫描匹配代价因子。我们在公共数据集以及自收集的来自不同环境的数据上评估了我们的框架。结果表明，该框架能够以低误差实现准确且鲁棒的地图融合，且学习到的特征在回环检测和相对位姿估计中均表现出强大的性能。

title: ROBOPOL: Social Robotics Meets Vehicular Communications for Cooperative Automated Driving
summary: On the way towards full autonomy, sharing roads between automated vehicles and human actors in so-called mixed traffic is unavoidable. Moreover, even if all vehicles on the road were autonomous, pedestrians would still be crossing the streets. We propose social robots as moderators between autonomous vehicles and vulnerable road users (VRU). To this end, we identify four enablers requiring integration: (1) advanced perception, allowing the robot to see the environment; (2) vehicular communications allowing connected vehicles to share intentions and the robot to send guiding commands; (3) social human-robot interaction allowing the robot to effectively communicate with VRUs and drivers; (4) formal specification allowing the robot to understand traffic and plan accordingly. This paper presents an overview of the key enablers and report on a first proof-of-concept integration of the first three enablers envisioning a social robot advising pedestrians in scenarios with a cooperative automated e-bike.
tldr: This paper proposes using social robots to mediate interactions between autonomous vehicles and vulnerable road users, integrating perception, vehicular communications, and social human-robot interaction. A proof-of-concept involving pedestrian guidance with a cooperative e-bike is presented.
tldr_zh: 本文提出使用社交机器人来协调自动驾驶车辆和弱势道路使用者之间的互动，集成了感知、车辆通信和社交人机交互。展示了一个概念验证，涉及使用合作电动自行车引导行人。
summary_zh: 在迈向完全自主化的道路上，自动驾驶车辆与人类驾驶员在所谓的混合交通环境中共享道路是不可避免的。此外，即使道路上的所有车辆都是自动驾驶的，行人仍然需要穿过街道。我们提出使用社交机器人作为自动驾驶车辆与弱势道路使用者（VRU）之间的协调者。为此，我们确定了需要集成实现的四个要素：（1）先进的感知能力，使机器人能够感知环境；（2）车辆通信能力，允许联网车辆共享意图，并允许机器人发送引导指令；（3）社交人机交互能力，允许机器人有效地与弱势道路使用者和驾驶员交流；（4）形式化规范能力，允许机器人理解交通状况并相应地进行规划。本文概述了这些关键要素，并报告了前三个要素的初步概念验证集成，设想了一种社交机器人在与合作型自动驾驶电动自行车的场景中为行人提供建议。

title: Evaluation of Impression Difference of a Domestic Mobile Manipulator with Autonomous and/or Remote Control in Fetch-and-Carry Tasks
summary: A single service robot can present two distinct agencies: its onboard autonomy and an operator-mediated agency, yet users experience them through one physical body. We formalize this dual-agency structure as a User-Robot-Operator triad in an autonomous remote-control setting that combines autonomous execution with remote human support. Prior to the recent surge of language-based and multimodal interfaces, we developed and evaluated an early-stage prototype in 2020 that combined natural-language text chat with freehand sketch annotations over the robot's live camera view to support remote intervention. We evaluated three modes - autonomous, remote, and hybrid - in controlled fetch-and-carry tasks using a domestic mobile manipulator (HSR) on a World Robot Summit 2020 rule-compliant test field. The results show systematic mode-dependent differences in user-rated affinity and additional insights on perceived security, indicating that switching or blending agency within one robot measurably shapes human impressions. These findings provide empirical guidance for designing human-in-the-loop mobile manipulation in domestic physical tasks.
tldr: This paper evaluates the impact of autonomous, remote, and hybrid control modes on user perceptions of a mobile manipulator performing fetch-and-carry tasks, finding mode-dependent differences in user-rated affinity and perceived security.
tldr_zh: 本文评估了自主、远程和混合控制模式对用户感知移动操作臂执行取放任务的影响，发现用户评价的亲和力和感知安全性存在依赖于模式的差异。
summary_zh: 一个单独的服务机器人能够呈现两种截然不同的主体性：其自身的自主性和操作员介导的主体性，然而用户通过同一个物理实体来体验它们。我们在一个结合了自主执行和远程人类支持的自主遥控设置中，将这种双主体性结构形式化为一个用户-机器人-操作员三元组。在近期基于语言和多模态界面兴起之前，我们于2020年开发并评估了一个早期原型，该原型将自然语言文本聊天与机器人的实时摄像头视图上的手绘草图注释相结合，以支持远程干预。我们使用一台家用移动机械臂（HSR）在一个符合2020年世界机器人峰会规则的测试场地中，在受控的取放任务中评估了三种模式——自主、远程和混合。结果表明，在用户评价的亲和力方面存在系统性的、依赖于模式的差异，以及关于感知安全性的额外见解，这表明在一个机器人内部切换或混合主体性可以显著地影响人类的印象。这些发现为设计家庭物理任务中的人机协作移动操作提供了经验指导。

title: SHIELD: Spherical-Projection Hybrid-Frontier Integration for Efficient LiDAR-based Drone Exploration
summary: This paper introduces SHIELD, a Spherical-Projection Hybrid-Frontier Integration for Efficient LiDAR-based Drone exploration method. Although laser LiDAR offers the advantage of a wide field of view, its application in UAV exploration still faces several challenges. The observation quality of LiDAR point clouds is generally inferior to that of depth cameras. Traditional frontier methods based on known and unknown regions impose a heavy computational burden, especially when handling the wide field of view of LiDAR. In addition, regions without point cloud are also difficult to classify as free space through raycasting. To address these problems, the SHIELD is proposed. It maintains an observation-quality occupancy map and performs ray-casting on this map to address the issue of inconsistent point-cloud quality during exploration. A hybrid frontier method is used to tackle both the computational burden and the limitations of point-cloud quality exploration. In addition, an outward spherical-projection ray-casting strategy is proposed to jointly ensure flight safety and exploration efficiency in open areas. Simulations and flight experiments prove the effectiveness of SHIELD. This work will be open-sourced to contribute to the research community.
tldr: The paper presents SHIELD, a novel LiDAR-based drone exploration method that uses a spherical-projection hybrid-frontier integration to improve efficiency and safety while addressing challenges related to inconsistent LiDAR point cloud quality and computational burden.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SHIELD，一种新颖的基于激光雷达的无人机探索方法，它使用球面投影混合边界集成来提高效率和安全性，同时解决与不一致的激光雷达点云质量和计算负担相关的挑战。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为SHIELD的方法，即基于激光雷达的无人机高效探索的球形投影混合边界融合方法。尽管激光雷达具有视野宽广的优势，但其在无人机探索中的应用仍然面临诸多挑战。激光雷达点云的观测质量通常不如深度相机。传统的基于已知和未知区域的边界方法带来了沉重的计算负担，尤其是在处理激光雷达的宽广视野时。此外，没有点云的区域也难以通过光线投射分类为自由空间。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了SHIELD。它维护一个观测质量占据栅格地图，并在该地图上执行光线投射，以解决探索过程中点云质量不一致的问题。采用了一种混合边界方法，以应对计算负担和点云质量探索的局限性。此外，还提出了一种向外的球形投影光线投射策略，以共同确保开阔区域的飞行安全和探索效率。仿真和飞行实验证明了SHIELD的有效性。这项工作将开源，以贡献于研究界。

title: SCP: Accelerating Discovery with a Global Web of Autonomous Scientific Agents
summary: We introduce SCP: the Science Context Protocol, an open-source standard designed to accelerate discovery by enabling a global network of autonomous scientific agents. SCP is built on two foundational pillars: (1) Unified Resource Integration: At its core, SCP provides a universal specification for describing and invoking scientific resources, spanning software tools, models, datasets, and physical instruments. This protocol-level standardization enables AI agents and applications to discover, call, and compose capabilities seamlessly across disparate platforms and institutional boundaries. (2) Orchestrated Experiment Lifecycle Management: SCP complements the protocol with a secure service architecture, which comprises a centralized SCP Hub and federated SCP Servers. This architecture manages the complete experiment lifecycle (registration, planning, execution, monitoring, and archival), enforces fine-grained authentication and authorization, and orchestrates traceable, end-to-end workflows that bridge computational and physical laboratories. Based on SCP, we have constructed a scientific discovery platform that offers researchers and agents a large-scale ecosystem of more than 1,600 tool resources. Across diverse use cases, SCP facilitates secure, large-scale collaboration between heterogeneous AI systems and human researchers while significantly reducing integration overhead and enhancing reproducibility. By standardizing scientific context and tool orchestration at the protocol level, SCP establishes essential infrastructure for scalable, multi-institution, agent-driven science.
tldr: The paper introduces SCP, an open-source protocol for enabling a global network of autonomous scientific agents, facilitating resource integration and experiment lifecycle management to accelerate scientific discovery.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了SCP，一个开源协议，旨在实现一个全球性的自主科学代理网络，促进资源整合和实验生命周期管理，以加速科学发现。
summary_zh: 我们介绍SCP：科学环境协议，一种旨在通过支持自主科研代理的全球网络来加速发现的开源标准。SCP建立在两个基础支柱之上：（1）统一资源集成：SCP的核心是为描述和调用科学资源（涵盖软件工具、模型、数据集和物理仪器）提供通用规范。这种协议级的标准化使AI代理和应用程序能够跨越不同的平台和机构边界，无缝地发现、调用和组合各种能力。（2）编排式实验生命周期管理：SCP通过安全的服务器架构来补充协议，该架构包括一个中心化的SCP Hub和联邦化的SCP Server。此架构管理完整的实验生命周期（注册、计划、执行、监控和存档），执行细粒度的身份验证和授权，并编排可追溯的端到端工作流程，从而连接计算实验室和物理实验室。基于SCP，我们构建了一个科学发现平台，为研究人员和代理提供了一个包含超过1600个工具资源的大规模生态系统。在不同的用例中，SCP促进了异构AI系统和人类研究人员之间安全、大规模的协作，同时显著降低了集成开销并增强了可重复性。通过在协议级别标准化科学环境和工具编排，SCP为可扩展的、多机构的、由代理驱动的科学建立了必要的基础设施。

title: Lifelong Domain Adaptive 3D Human Pose Estimation
summary: 3D Human Pose Estimation (3D HPE) is vital in various applications, from person re-identification and action recognition to virtual reality. However, the reliance on annotated 3D data collected in controlled environments poses challenges for generalization to diverse in-the-wild scenarios. Existing domain adaptation (DA) paradigms like general DA and source-free DA for 3D HPE overlook the issues of non-stationary target pose datasets. To address these challenges, we propose a novel task named lifelong domain adaptive 3D HPE. To our knowledge, we are the first to introduce the lifelong domain adaptation to the 3D HPE task. In this lifelong DA setting, the pose estimator is pretrained on the source domain and subsequently adapted to distinct target domains. Moreover, during adaptation to the current target domain, the pose estimator cannot access the source and all the previous target domains. The lifelong DA for 3D HPE involves overcoming challenges in adapting to current domain poses and preserving knowledge from previous domains, particularly combating catastrophic forgetting. We present an innovative Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) framework, which incorporates 3D pose generators, a 2D pose discriminator, and a 3D pose estimator. This framework effectively mitigates domain shifts and aligns original and augmented poses. Moreover, we construct a novel 3D pose generator paradigm, integrating pose-aware, temporal-aware, and domain-aware knowledge to enhance the current domain's adaptation and alleviate catastrophic forgetting on previous domains. Our method demonstrates superior performance through extensive experiments on diverse domain adaptive 3D HPE datasets.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel lifelong domain adaptation approach for 3D human pose estimation, utilizing a GAN framework with pose, temporal, and domain-aware pose generators to address catastrophic forgetting across diverse target domains.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于3D人体姿态估计的终身领域自适应方法，利用GAN框架和具有姿态、时间和领域感知的姿态生成器来解决跨不同目标领域的灾难性遗忘问题。
summary_zh: 人体三维姿态估计（3D HPE）在人员重识别、动作识别和虚拟现实等多种应用中至关重要。然而，依赖于受控环境中采集的带标注三维数据，给泛化到各种野外场景带来了挑战。现有的适用于三维人体姿态估计的领域自适应（DA）范式，如通用领域自适应和无源领域自适应，忽略了非平稳目标姿态数据集的问题。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为终身领域自适应三维人体姿态估计的新任务。据我们所知，我们是第一个将终身领域自适应引入三维人体姿态估计任务的。在这种终身领域自适应设置中，姿态估计器在源域上进行预训练，然后自适应到不同的目标域。此外，在适应当前目标域期间，姿态估计器无法访问源域和所有先前的目标域。用于三维人体姿态估计的终身领域自适应涉及克服适应当前域姿态和保留来自先前域的知识的挑战，特别是对抗灾难性遗忘。我们提出了一种创新的生成对抗网络（GAN）框架，该框架包含三维姿态生成器、二维姿态判别器和三维姿态估计器。该框架有效地缓解了领域偏移并对齐了原始姿态和增强姿态。此外，我们构建了一种新颖的三维姿态生成器范式，整合了姿态感知、时间感知和领域感知知识，以增强当前域的自适应性并减轻先前域的灾难性遗忘。通过在各种领域自适应三维人体姿态估计数据集上进行的大量实验，我们的方法展示了卓越的性能。

title: Video-Based Performance Evaluation for ECR Drills in Synthetic Training Environments
summary: Effective urban warfare training requires situational awareness and muscle memory, developed through repeated practice in realistic yet controlled environments. A key drill, Enter and Clear the Room (ECR), demands threat assessment, coordination, and securing confined spaces. The military uses Synthetic Training Environments that offer scalable, controlled settings for repeated exercises. However, automatic performance assessment remains challenging, particularly when aiming for objective evaluation of cognitive, psychomotor, and teamwork skills. Traditional methods often rely on costly, intrusive sensors or subjective human observation, limiting scalability and accuracy. This paper introduces a video-based assessment pipeline that derives performance analytics from training videos without requiring additional hardware. By utilizing computer vision models, the system extracts 2D skeletons, gaze vectors, and movement trajectories. From these data, we develop task-specific metrics that measure psychomotor fluency, situational awareness, and team coordination. These metrics feed into an extended Cognitive Task Analysis (CTA) hierarchy, which employs a weighted combination to generate overall performance scores for teamwork and cognition. We demonstrate the approach with a case study of real-world ECR drills, providing actionable, domain specific metrics that capture individual and team performance. We also discuss how these insights can support After Action Reviews with interactive dashboards within Gamemaster and the Generalized Intelligent Framework for Tutoring (GIFT), providing intuitive and understandable feedback. We conclude by addressing limitations, including tracking difficulties, ground-truth validation, and the broader applicability of our approach. Future work includes expanding analysis to 3D video data and leveraging video analysis to enable scalable evaluation within STEs.
tldr: This paper introduces a video-based assessment pipeline for evaluating performance in ECR drills within synthetic training environments, using computer vision to extract metrics for psychomotor fluency, situational awareness, and team coordination.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于视频的评估流程，用于评估合成训练环境中 ECR 演习的性能，使用计算机视觉提取速度，情境感知和团队协调的指标。
summary_zh: 有效的城市作战训练需要情境感知和肌肉记忆，这两者都要通过在真实但可控的环境中反复练习来培养。“进入并清理房间”（ECR）是一项关键的演练，需要威胁评估、协调以及确保密闭空间的安全。军方使用合成训练环境（STE），它为重复练习提供可扩展、可控的设置。然而，自动性能评估仍然具有挑战性，尤其是在旨在对认知、精神运动和团队合作技能进行客观评估时。传统方法通常依赖于成本高昂且具有侵入性的传感器或主观的人工观察，限制了可扩展性和准确性。本文介绍了一种基于视频的评估流程，该流程从训练视频中提取性能分析数据，而无需额外的硬件。通过利用计算机视觉模型，该系统提取2D骨骼、视线向量和运动轨迹。从这些数据中，我们开发了特定于任务的指标，以衡量精神运动流畅性、情境感知和团队协调。这些指标被输入到一个扩展的认知任务分析 (CTA) 层次结构中，该层次结构采用加权组合来生成团队合作和认知的总体绩效评分。我们通过一个真实世界 ECR 演练的案例研究来演示这种方法，提供可操作的、特定于领域的指标，来捕捉个人和团队的绩效。我们还讨论了这些见解如何支持事后回顾，通过在游戏管理员 (Gamemaster) 和通用智能辅导框架 (GIFT) 中的交互式仪表板提供直观且易于理解的反馈。最后，我们讨论了局限性，包括跟踪困难、地面实况验证以及我们方法的更广泛适用性。未来的工作包括将分析扩展到 3D 视频数据，并利用视频分析来实现 STE 中可扩展的评估。

title: Paired Seed Evaluation: Statistical Reliability for Learning-Based Simulators
summary: Machine learning systems appear stochastic but are deterministically random, as seeded pseudorandom number generators produce identical realisations across executions. Learning-based simulators are widely used to compare algorithms, design choices, and interventions under such dynamics, yet evaluation outcomes often exhibit high variance due to random initialisation and learning stochasticity. We analyse the statistical structure of comparative evaluation in these settings and show that standard independent evaluation designs fail to exploit shared sources of randomness across alternatives. We formalise a paired seed evaluation design in which competing systems are evaluated under identical random seeds, inducing matched realisations of stochastic components and strict variance reduction whenever outcomes are positively correlated at the seed level. This yields tighter confidence intervals, higher statistical power, and effective sample size gains at fixed computational budgets. Empirically, seed-level correlations are typically large and positive, producing order-of-magnitude efficiency gains. Paired seed evaluation is weakly dominant in practice, improving statistical reliability when correlation is present and reducing to independent evaluation without loss of validity when it is not.
tldr: The paper introduces paired seed evaluation, a method for improving the statistical reliability of learning-based simulator evaluations by exploiting shared randomness across different systems, leading to significant efficiency gains.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种配对种子评估方法，通过利用不同系统之间的共享随机性来提高基于学习的模拟器评估的统计可靠性，从而显著提高效率。
summary_zh: 机器学习系统表面上具有随机性，但实际上是确定性的随机，因为带种子的伪随机数生成器在多次执行中产生相同的实现。基于学习的模拟器被广泛用于比较算法、设计选择和干预措施，但在这种动态下，评估结果经常表现出高方差，这归因于随机初始化和学习过程的随机性。我们分析了这些设置下比较评估的统计结构，并表明标准的独立评估设计未能利用不同替代方案之间共享的随机性来源。我们形式化了一种配对种子评估设计，其中竞争系统在相同的随机种子下进行评估，从而诱导随机分量的匹配实现，并在结果在种子级别呈正相关时实现严格的方差缩减。这产生了更紧密的置信区间、更高的统计功效以及在固定计算预算下的有效样本量增加。从经验上看，种子级别的相关性通常很大且为正，从而产生数量级的效率提升。配对种子评估在实践中是弱占优的，在存在相关性时提高了统计可靠性，并在不存在相关性时简化为独立的评估，而不会损失有效性。

title: New Insights into Cascaded Geometric Flight Control: From Performance Guarantees to Practical Pitfalls
summary: We present a new stability proof for cascaded geometric control used by aerial vehicles tracking time-varying position trajectories. Our approach uses sliding variables and a recently proposed quaternion-based sliding controller to demonstrate that exponentially convergent position trajectory tracking is theoretically possible. Notably, our analysis reveals new aspects of the control strategy, including how tracking error in the attitude loop influences the position loop, how model uncertainties affect the closed-loop system, and the practical pitfalls of the control architecture.
tldr: This paper presents a new stability proof for cascaded geometric control of aerial vehicles, analyzing the impact of attitude tracking errors and model uncertainties on position tracking performance, and identifying practical pitfalls.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的针对飞行器级联几何控制的稳定性证明，分析了姿态跟踪误差和模型不确定性对位置跟踪性能的影响，并确定了实际应用中的陷阱。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种针对无人飞行器跟踪时变位置轨迹的级联几何控制的新稳定性证明。 我们的方法利用滑模变量和一个最近提出的基于四元数的滑模控制器，来证明指数收敛的位置轨迹跟踪在理论上是可行的。 值得注意的是，我们的分析揭示了控制策略的新方面，包括姿态环中的跟踪误差如何影响位置环，模型不确定性如何影响闭环系统，以及控制架构的实际缺陷。

title: 3D Path-Following Guidance via Nonlinear Model Predictive Control for Fixed-Wing Small UAS
summary: This paper presents the design, implementation, and flight test results of two novel 3D path-following guidance algorithms based on nonlinear model predictive control (MPC), with specific application to fixed-wing small uncrewed aircraft systems. To enable MPC, control-augmented modelling and system identification of the RAAVEN small uncrewed aircraft is presented. Two formulations of MPC are then showcased. The first schedules a static reference path rate over the MPC horizon, incentivizing a constant inertial speed. The second, with inspiration from model predictive contouring control, dynamically optimizes for the reference path rate over the controller horizon as the system operates. This allows for a weighted tradeoff between path progression and distance from path, two competing objectives in path-following guidance. Both controllers are formulated to operate over general smooth 3D arc-length parameterized curves. The MPC guidance algorithms are flown over several high-curvature test paths, with comparison to a baseline lookahead guidance law. The results showcase the real-world feasibility and superior performance of nonlinear MPC for 3D path-following guidance at ground speeds up to 36 meters per second.
tldr: This paper introduces two novel 3D path-following guidance algorithms for fixed-wing small UAS using nonlinear Model Predictive Control (MPC), demonstrating superior performance compared to a baseline lookahead guidance law in flight tests.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了两种基于非线性模型预测控制（MPC）的新型固定翼小型无人机3D路径跟踪引导算法，并通过飞行测试验证了其优于基线前视引导律的性能。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了两种基于非线性模型预测控制(MPC)的新型3D路径跟踪制导算法的设计、实现及飞行试验结果，并将其专门应用于固定翼小型无人机系统。 为了实现MPC，本文展示了RAAVEN小型无人机的控制增强建模和系统辨识。 随后，展示了两种MPC公式。 第一种是在MPC范围内调度静态参考路径速率，以激励恒定的惯性速度。 第二种，受到模型预测轮廓控制的启发，在系统运行时动态优化控制器范围内的参考路径速率。 这允许在路径进程和距路径的距离之间进行加权权衡，这是路径跟踪制导中的两个相互竞争的目标。 两种控制器都被设计为在通用的平滑3D弧长参数化曲线上运行。 MPC制导算法在几个高曲率测试路径上进行了飞行测试，并与基准前视制导律进行了比较。 结果表明，非线性MPC在高达36米/秒的地速下，对于3D路径跟踪制导具有实际可行性和卓越的性能。

title: RflyUT-Sim: A Simulation Platform for Development and Testing of Complex Low-Altitude Traffic Control
summary: Significant challenges are posed by simulation and testing in the field of low-altitude unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) traffic due to the high costs associated with large-scale UAV testing and the complexity of establishing low-altitude traffic test scenarios. Stringent safety requirements make high fidelity one of the key metrics for simulation platforms. Despite advancements in simulation platforms for low-altitude UAVs, there is still a shortage of platforms that feature rich traffic scenarios, high-precision UAV and scenario simulators, and comprehensive testing capabilities for low-altitude traffic. Therefore, this paper introduces an integrated high-fidelity simulation platform for low-altitude UAV traffic. This platform simulates all components of the UAV traffic network, including the control system, the traffic management system, the UAV system, the communication network , the anomaly and fault modules, etc. Furthermore, it integrates RflySim/AirSim and Unreal Engine 5 to develop full-state models of UAVs and 3D maps that model the real world using the oblique photogrammetry technique. Additionally, the platform offers a wide range of interfaces, and all models and scenarios can be customized with a high degree of flexibility. The platform's source code has been released, making it easier to conduct research related to low-altitude traffic.
tldr: The paper introduces RflyUT-Sim, a high-fidelity simulation platform for low-altitude UAV traffic management, offering customizable models, scenarios, and comprehensive testing capabilities.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个用于低空无人机交通管理的高保真仿真平台RflyUT-Sim，该平台提供可定制的模型、场景和全面的测试功能。
summary_zh: 由于大规模无人机测试成本高昂以及建立低空交通测试场景的复杂性，低空无人机交通领域的仿真与测试面临着重大挑战。严格的安全要求使得高保真成为仿真平台的一项关键指标。尽管低空无人机仿真平台已取得进展，但仍然缺乏具有丰富交通场景、高精度无人机与场景模拟器以及全面低空交通测试能力的平台。因此，本文介绍了一种集成的低空无人机交通高保真仿真平台。 该平台模拟了无人机交通网络的所有组成部分，包括控制系统、交通管理系统、无人机系统、通信网络、异常与故障模块等。此外，它集成了 RflySim/AirSim 和 Unreal Engine 5，以开发无人机的全状态模型和使用倾斜摄影技术对真实世界进行建模的 3D 地图。此外，该平台提供广泛的接口，所有模型和场景都可以高度灵活地进行定制。 该平台的源代码已发布，使其更容易进行与低空交通相关的研究。

title: Empower Low-Altitude Economy: A Reliability-Aware Dynamic Weighting Allocation for Multi-modal UAV Beam Prediction
summary: The low-altitude economy (LAE) is rapidly expanding driven by urban air mobility, logistics drones, and aerial sensing, while fast and accurate beam prediction in uncrewed aerial vehicles (UAVs) communications is crucial for achieving reliable connectivity. Current research is shifting from single-signal to multi-modal collaborative approaches. However, existing multi-modal methods mostly employ fixed or empirical weights, assuming equal reliability across modalities at any given moment. Indeed, the importance of different modalities fluctuates dramatically with UAV motion scenarios, and static weighting amplifies the negative impact of degraded modalities. Furthermore, modal mismatch and weak alignment further undermine cross-scenario generalization. To this end, we propose a reliability-aware dynamic weighting scheme applied to a semantic-aware multi-modal beam prediction framework, named SaM2B. Specifically, SaM2B leverages lightweight cues such as environmental visual, flight posture, and geospatial data to adaptively allocate contributions across modalities at different time points through reliability-aware dynamic weight updates. Moreover, by utilizing cross-modal contrastive learning, we align the "multi-source representation beam semantics" associated with specific beam information to a shared semantic space, thereby enhancing discriminative power and robustness under modal noise and distribution shifts. Experiments on real-world low-altitude UAV datasets show that SaM2B achieves more satisfactory results than baseline methods.
tldr: The paper introduces SaM2B, a reliability-aware dynamic weighting scheme for multi-modal beam prediction in UAV communications, leveraging environmental visual, flight posture, and geospatial data, showing improved performance on real-world datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SaM2B，一种可靠性感知动态加权方案，用于无人机通信中的多模态波束预测，利用环境视觉、飞行姿态和地理空间数据，并在真实世界的数据集上表现出改进的性能。
summary_zh:
摘要：
在城市空中交通、物流无人机和空中传感的驱动下，低空经济(LAE)正在迅速扩张，而无人驾驶飞行器(UAV)通信中的快速准确波束预测对于实现可靠连接至关重要。当前的研究正从单信号方法转向多模态协作方法。然而，现有的多模态方法大多采用固定或经验权重，假设在任何给定时刻，各模态的可靠性相等。实际上，不同模态的重要性随着无人机运动场景的变化而剧烈波动，静态加权会放大退化模态的负面影响。此外，模态失配和弱对齐进一步削弱了跨场景泛化能力。为此，我们提出了一种可靠性感知动态加权方案，应用于语义感知的多模态波束预测框架，命名为SaM2B。具体来说，SaM2B利用诸如环境视觉、飞行姿态和地理空间数据等轻量级线索，通过可靠性感知动态权重更新，自适应地分配不同时间点各模态的贡献。此外，通过利用跨模态对比学习，我们将与特定波束信息相关的“多源表示波束语义”对齐到共享语义空间，从而增强模态噪声和分布偏移下的判别能力和鲁棒性。在真实低空无人机数据集上的实验表明，SaM2B比基线方法取得了更令人满意的结果。

title: Kinematic-Based Assessment of Surgical Actions in Microanastomosis
summary: Proficiency in microanastomosis is a critical surgical skill in neurosurgery, where the ability to precisely manipulate fine instruments is crucial to successful outcomes. These procedures require sustained attention, coordinated hand movements, and highly refined motor skills, underscoring the need for objective and systematic methods to evaluate and enhance microsurgical training. Conventional assessment approaches typically rely on expert raters supervising the procedures or reviewing surgical videos, which is an inherently subjective process prone to inter-rater variability, inconsistency, and significant time investment. These limitations highlight the necessity for automated and scalable solutions. To address this challenge, we introduce a novel AI-driven framework for automated action segmentation and performance assessment in microanastomosis procedures, designed to operate efficiently on edge computing platforms. The proposed system comprises three main components: (1) an object tip tracking and localization module based on YOLO and DeepSORT; (2) an action segmentation module leveraging self-similarity matrix for action boundary detection and unsupervised clustering; and (3) a supervised classification module designed to evaluate surgical gesture proficiency. Experimental validation on a dataset of 58 expert-rated microanastomosis videos demonstrates the effectiveness of our approach, achieving a frame-level action segmentation accuracy of 92.4% and an overall skill classification accuracy of 85.5% in replicating expert evaluations. These findings demonstrate the potential of the proposed method to provide objective, real-time feedback in microsurgical education, thereby enabling more standardized, data-driven training protocols and advancing competency assessment in high-stakes surgical environments.
tldr: The paper introduces an AI-driven framework for automated action segmentation and performance assessment in microanastomosis, achieving high accuracy in action segmentation and skill classification using a combination of object tracking, self-similarity matrices, and supervised learning.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种AI驱动的微吻合术中自动动作分割和性能评估框架，通过结合目标跟踪、自相似矩阵和监督学习，在动作分割和技能分类方面实现了高精度。
summary_zh: 显微吻合术的熟练掌握是神经外科一项关键的手术技能，其中精确操控精细器械的能力对于成功的手术结果至关重要。这些手术需要持续的注意力、协调的手部动作和高度精细的运动技能，突显了对客观和系统化方法来评估和提升显微外科手术培训的需求。传统的评估方法通常依赖于专家评估员监督手术过程或审查手术视频，这本质上是一个主观过程，容易出现评估者间差异、不一致性以及大量的时间投入。这些局限性凸显了对自动化和可扩展解决方案的必要性。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了一种新型的AI驱动框架，用于显微吻合术流程中的自动动作分割和表现评估，该框架旨在在边缘计算平台上高效运行。所提出的系统包括三个主要组成部分：（1）基于YOLO和DeepSORT的目标物尖端追踪和定位模块；（2）利用自相似性矩阵进行动作边界检测和无监督聚类的动作分割模块；以及（3）旨在评估手术手势熟练程度的监督分类模块。在包含58个专家评估的显微吻合术视频的数据集上的实验验证表明了我们方法的有效性，在复制专家评估方面实现了92.4%的帧级别动作分割准确率和85.5%的整体技能分类准确率。这些发现证明了所提出的方法在显微外科教育中提供客观、实时反馈的潜力，从而能够实现更标准化、数据驱动的培训协议，并在高风险手术环境中推进能力评估。

title: Learning to learn skill assessment for fetal ultrasound scanning
summary: Traditionally, ultrasound skill assessment has relied on expert supervision and feedback, a process known for its subjectivity and time-intensive nature. Previous works on quantitative and automated skill assessment have predominantly employed supervised learning methods, often limiting the analysis to predetermined or assumed factors considered influential in determining skill levels. In this work, we propose a novel bi-level optimisation framework that assesses fetal ultrasound skills by how well a task is performed on the acquired fetal ultrasound images, without using manually predefined skill ratings. The framework consists of a clinical task predictor and a skill predictor, which are optimised jointly by refining the two networks simultaneously. We validate the proposed method on real-world clinical ultrasound videos of scanning the fetal head. The results demonstrate the feasibility of predicting ultrasound skills by the proposed framework, which quantifies optimised task performance as a skill indicator.
tldr: This paper introduces a bi-level optimization framework to assess fetal ultrasound scanning skills by predicting task performance on ultrasound images without relying on manually predefined skill ratings, offering a potentially less subjective approach to skill assessment.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种双层优化框架，通过预测超声图像上的任务性能来评估胎儿超声扫描技能，而无需依赖手动预定义的技能评级，为技能评估提供了一种潜在的更客观的方法。
summary_zh: 传统上，超声技能评估依赖于专家监督和反馈，这一过程因其主观性和耗时性而闻名。以往关于定量和自动化技能评估的研究主要采用监督学习方法，通常将分析局限于预先确定或假定的、被认为对决定技能水平有影响的因素。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的双层优化框架，该框架通过在获取的胎儿超声图像上任务执行的优劣程度来评估胎儿超声技能，而无需使用手动预定义的技能评级。该框架由一个临床任务预测器和一个技能预测器组成，通过同时优化两个网络来联合优化它们。我们在真实临床胎儿头部扫描超声视频上验证了所提出的方法。结果表明，所提出的框架能够预测超声技能，并将优化的任务性能量化为技能指标。

title: Safe Sliding Mode Control for Marine Vessels Using High-Order Control Barrier Functions and Fast Projection
summary: This paper presents a novel safe control framework that integrates Sliding Mode Control (SMC), High-Order Control Barrier Functions (HOCBFs) with state-dependent adaptiveness and a lightweight projection for collision-free navigation of an over-actuated 3-DOF marine surface vessel subjected to strong environmental disturbances (wind, waves, and current). SMC provides robustness to matched disturbances common in marine operations, while HOCBFs enforce forward invariance of obstacle-avoidance constraints. A fast half-space projection method adjusts the SMC control only when needed, preserving robustness and minimizing chattering. The approach is evaluated on a nonlinear marine platform model that includes added mass, hydrodynamic damping, and full thruster allocation. Simulation results show robust navigation, guaranteed obstacle avoidance, and computational efficiency suitable for real-time embedded use. For small marine robots and surface vessels with limited onboard computational resources-where execution speed and computational efficiency are critical-the SMC-HOCBF framework constitutes a strong candidate for safety-critical control.
tldr: This paper introduces a computationally efficient safe control framework for marine vessels using Sliding Mode Control (SMC) and High-Order Control Barrier Functions (HOCBFs) to ensure robust, collision-free navigation even with environmental disturbances.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种计算高效的船舶安全控制框架，该框架使用滑模控制（SMC）和高阶控制障碍函数（HOCBFs）来确保在环境干扰下实现鲁棒、无碰撞的导航。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新型安全控制框架，该框架集成了滑模控制(SMC)、具有状态依赖自适应性的高阶控制障碍函数(HOCBFs)以及轻量级投影，用于在强环境扰动（风、浪和流）下对超致动3自由度水面船舶进行无碰撞导航。SMC为海洋作业中常见的匹配扰动提供鲁棒性，而HOCBFs则强制执行避障约束的前向不变性。一种快速半空间投影方法仅在必要时调整SMC控制，以保持鲁棒性并最大限度地减少抖振。该方法在一个非线性海洋平台模型上进行了评估，该模型包括附加质量、水动力阻尼和完整的推进器分配。仿真结果表明具有鲁棒的导航性能、有保证的避障能力以及适用于实时嵌入式应用的高计算效率。对于板载计算资源有限的小型海洋机器人和水面船舶，执行速度和计算效率至关重要，SMC-HOCBF框架是安全关键控制的有力候选方案。

title: FedSecureFormer: A Fast, Federated and Secure Transformer Framework for Lightweight Intrusion Detection in Connected and Autonomous Vehicles
summary: This works presents an encoder-only transformer built with minimum layers for intrusion detection in the domain of Connected and Autonomous Vehicles using Federated Learning.
tldr: The paper proposes a fast, federated, and secure Transformer framework for intrusion detection in connected and autonomous vehicles, specifically designed with minimal layers for lightweight implementation.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一个快速、联邦和安全的Transformer框架，用于在联网和自动驾驶车辆中进行入侵检测，该框架专门设计为具有最少层数，以实现轻量级实现。
summary_zh: 本研究提出了一种仅使用最少层构建的仅编码器Transformer，用于在联邦学习中使用，以检测联网和自动驾驶车辆领域的入侵行为。

title: PointRAFT: 3D deep learning for high-throughput prediction of potato tuber weight from partial point clouds
summary: Potato yield is a key indicator for optimizing cultivation practices in agriculture. Potato yield can be estimated on harvesters using RGB-D cameras, which capture three-dimensional (3D) information of individual tubers moving along the conveyor belt. However, point clouds reconstructed from RGB-D images are incomplete due to self-occlusion, leading to systematic underestimation of tuber weight. To address this, we introduce PointRAFT, a high-throughput point cloud regression network that directly predicts continuous 3D shape properties, such as tuber weight, from partial point clouds. Rather than reconstructing full 3D geometry, PointRAFT infers target values directly from raw 3D data. Its key architectural novelty is an object height embedding that incorporates tuber height as an additional geometric cue, improving weight prediction under practical harvesting conditions. PointRAFT was trained and evaluated on 26,688 partial point clouds collected from 859 potato tubers across four cultivars and three growing seasons on an operational harvester in Japan. On a test set of 5,254 point clouds from 172 tubers, PointRAFT achieved a mean absolute error of 12.0 g and a root mean squared error of 17.2 g, substantially outperforming a linear regression baseline and a standard PointNet++ regression network. With an average inference time of 6.3 ms per point cloud, PointRAFT supports processing rates of up to 150 tubers per second, meeting the high-throughput requirements of commercial potato harvesters. Beyond potato weight estimation, PointRAFT provides a versatile regression network applicable to a wide range of 3D phenotyping and robotic perception tasks. The code, network weights, and a subset of the dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/pieterblok/pointraft.git.
tldr: PointRAFT is a high-throughput point cloud regression network for predicting potato tuber weight from partial 3D data using a novel object height embedding, achieving state-of-the-art performance compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: PointRAFT是一种高吞吐量的点云回归网络，通过一种新颖的物体高度嵌入，从部分3D数据中预测马铃薯块茎的重量，与基线方法相比，实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 马铃薯产量是农业生产中优化栽培措施的关键指标。利用RGB-D相机可以在收割机上评估马铃薯产量，这些相机能够捕捉到沿传送带移动的单个薯块的三维(3D)信息。然而，由于自遮挡，从RGB-D图像重建的点云是不完整的，导致对薯块重量的系统性低估。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了PointRAFT，一种高吞吐量的点云回归网络，它可以直接从不完整的点云中预测连续的3D形状属性，例如薯块重量。PointRAFT并非重建完整的3D几何形状，而是直接从原始3D数据推断目标值。其关键的架构创新是一个对象高度嵌入，它将薯块高度作为额外的几何线索，从而改善了实际收获条件下重量预测的准确性。PointRAFT在日本一台正在作业的收割机上，使用来自四个品种和三个生长季的859个马铃薯薯块收集的26,688个不完整的点云进行训练和评估。在一个包含来自172个薯块的5,254个点云的测试集上，PointRAFT实现了12.0克的平均绝对误差和17.2克的均方根误差，显著优于线性回归基线和标准的PointNet++回归网络。PointRAFT的平均推理时间为每个点云6.3毫秒，支持高达每秒150个薯块的处理速度，满足了商业马铃薯收割机的高吞吐量需求。除了马铃薯重量估计，PointRAFT还提供了一个通用的回归网络，适用于广泛的3D表型分析和机器人感知任务。代码、网络权重和数据集的一部分可在https://github.com/pieterblok/pointraft.git公开获取。

title: FedLiTeCAN : A Federated Lightweight Transformer for Fast and Robust CAN Bus Intrusion Detection
summary: This work implements a lightweight Transformer model for IDS in the domain of Connected and Autonomous Vehicles
tldr: This paper proposes a lightweight Transformer model for intrusion detection systems (IDS) in connected and autonomous vehicles, specifically for CAN bus networks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种轻量级Transformer模型，用于连接和自动驾驶汽车中的入侵检测系统(IDS)，特别是针对CAN总线网络。
summary_zh: 该工作实现了一个轻量级Transformer模型，用于连接和自动驾驶车辆领域的入侵检测系统(IDS)。

title: Improved 3D Gaussian Splatting of Unknown Spacecraft Structure Using Space Environment Illumination Knowledge
summary: This work presents a novel pipeline to recover the 3D structure of an unknown target spacecraft from a sequence of images captured during Rendezvous and Proximity Operations (RPO) in space. The target's geometry and appearance are represented as a 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) model. However, learning 3DGS requires static scenes, an assumption in contrast to dynamic lighting conditions encountered in spaceborne imagery. The trained 3DGS model can also be used for camera pose estimation through photometric optimization. Therefore, in addition to recovering a geometrically accurate 3DGS model, the photometric accuracy of the rendered images is imperative to downstream pose estimation tasks during the RPO process. This work proposes to incorporate the prior knowledge of the Sun's position, estimated and maintained by the servicer spacecraft, into the training pipeline for improved photometric quality of 3DGS rasterization. Experimental studies demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed solution, as 3DGS models trained on a sequence of images learn to adapt to rapidly changing illumination conditions in space and reflect global shadowing and self-occlusion.
tldr: This paper presents a method to improve 3D Gaussian Splatting for reconstructing spacecraft structures from images taken in space by incorporating prior knowledge of the Sun's position, leading to improved photometric accuracy under dynamic lighting conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种通过结合太阳位置先验知识改进3D高斯溅射的方法，用于从太空图像中重建航天器结构，从而提高动态光照条件下光度准确性。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新的流程，用于从航天器在空间交会对接和近距离操作（RPO）期间捕获的图像序列中恢复未知目标航天器的三维结构。目标的几何形状和外观被表示为一个三维高斯溅射（3DGS）模型。然而，学习3DGS需要静态场景，这与星载图像中遇到的动态光照条件相悖。训练后的3DGS模型也可用于通过光度优化进行相机姿态估计。因此，除了恢复几何上精确的3DGS模型之外，渲染图像的光度精度对于RPO过程中的下游姿态估计任务至关重要。本文提出将服务航天器估计和保持的太阳位置的先验知识纳入训练流程，以提高3DGS光栅化的光度质量。实验研究表明了所提出解决方案的有效性，因为基于图像序列训练的3DGS模型能够适应空间中快速变化的光照条件，并反映全局阴影和自遮挡。

title: Multi-Scenario Highway Lane-Change Intention Prediction: A Temporal Physics-Informed Multi-Modal Framework
summary: Lane-change intention prediction is safety-critical for autonomous driving and ADAS, but remains difficult in naturalistic traffic due to noisy kinematics, severe class imbalance, and limited generalization across heterogeneous highway scenarios. We propose Temporal Physics-Informed AI (TPI-AI), a hybrid framework that fuses deep temporal representations with physics-inspired interaction cues. A two-layer bidirectional LSTM (Bi-LSTM) encoder learns compact embeddings from multi-step trajectory histories; we concatenate these embeddings with kinematics-, safety-, and interaction-aware features (e.g., headway, TTC, and safe-gap indicators) and train a LightGBM classifier for three-class intention recognition (No-LC, Left-LC, Right-LC). To improve minority-class reliability, we apply imbalance-aware optimization including resampling/weighting and fold-wise threshold calibration. Experiments on two large-scale drone-based datasets, highD (straight highways) and exiD (ramp-rich environments), use location-based splits and evaluate prediction horizons T = 1, 2, 3 s. TPI-AI outperforms standalone LightGBM and Bi-LSTM baselines, achieving macro-F1 of 0.9562, 0.9124, 0.8345 on highD and 0.9247, 0.8197, 0.7605 on exiD at T = 1, 2, 3 s, respectively. These results show that combining physics-informed interaction features with learned temporal embeddings yields robust multi-scenario lane-change intention prediction.
tldr: The paper proposes a Temporal Physics-Informed AI (TPI-AI) framework for lane-change intention prediction, combining deep temporal representations with physics-inspired interaction cues, and achieves strong results on two highway datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于车道变换意图预测的时序物理信息AI（TPI-AI）框架，该框架结合了深度时序表征和物理启发的交互线索，并在两个高速公路数据集上取得了不错的结果。
summary_zh: 变道意图预测对于自动驾驶和高级驾驶辅助系统至关重要，但由于噪声运动学、严重的类不平衡以及异构高速公路场景中有限的泛化能力，自然交通环境下的预测仍然困难。我们提出时间物理信息人工智能（TPI-AI），这是一个融合深度时间表示和物理启发式交互线索的混合框架。一个双层双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）编码器从多步轨迹历史中学习紧凑的嵌入；我们将这些嵌入与运动学、安全性和交互感知特征（例如，车头时距、碰撞时间 (TTC) 和安全间隙指标）连接起来，并训练一个 LightGBM 分类器用于三类意图识别（无变道、向左变道、向右变道）。为了提高少数类的可靠性，我们应用了包括重采样/加权和分层阈值校准在内的不平衡感知优化。在两个基于无人机的大规模数据集 highD（直线高速公路）和 exiD（匝道丰富的环境）上的实验，使用了基于位置的分割，并评估了预测范围 T = 1、2、3 秒。TPI-AI 优于独立的 LightGBM 和 Bi-LSTM 基线，在 highD 上分别实现了 0.9562、0.9124、0.8345 的宏平均 F1 值，在 exiD 上分别实现了 0.9247、0.8197、0.7605 的宏平均 F1 值（T = 1、2、3 秒）。这些结果表明，将物理信息交互特征与学习的时间嵌入相结合，可以实现鲁棒的多场景变道意图预测。
